features: „Äê HUB SPLITTERS„Äë The USB splitter is very small and lightweight, this USB hub has 1 USB 3.0 port and 2 USB 2.0 ports, split your single USB port into three. One USB interface can be expanded to multiple independent working , easy to use. (Note: This device cannot be used in a vehicle port!)

„ÄêWIDE APPLICATION„Äë All USB devices can be used. Such as connect keyboard, mouse, USB flash drive, card reader, USB radiator, MacBook, Mac Pro/Mini, Surface Pro, XPS, laptop, USB flash drive, mobile hard drive, printer, scanner, mobile phone, tablet computer, and other equipment.

„ÄêHIGH-SPEED DATA TRANSFER„Äë The USB 3.0 port provides fast data transfer speeds up to 5Gbps (theoretical speed), ensuring file transfer, synchronization and charging are fast and efficient, saying goodbye to slow data transfer speeds. The USB 2.0 port is suitable for connecting external devices.

„ÄêCOMPACT AND PORTABLE„ÄëTuck this lightweight gadget into your bag or pocket, perfect for travelers, students, and professionals who need added connectivity on the go. To easily expand your device with USB hub.

„Äê RELIABLE AND DURABLE„Äë Made of high-quality materials, each port of the USB hub has built-in over-current protection, providing a stable and safe connection for your devices, avoiding damage caused by short circuits, and ensuring worry-free use.
